description.en: Neural probabilistic language models replaced sparse n-gram tables with learned distributed word representations and a neural predictor. This helped connect language modeling to representation learning before word2vec and transformer LMs.
description.zh: 神经概率语言模型用学习得到的分布式词表示和神经预测器取代稀疏的 n-gram 表。在 word2vec 和 Transformer 语言模型之前，它把语言建模与表示学习连接起来。

subcaption.en: Lead author of the neural probabilistic language model.
subcaption.zh: 神经概率语言模型主要作者。

subcaption.en: Original local explainer of neural language modeling.
subcaption.zh: 关于神经语言建模的本地原创解释图。

license.en: Original local SVG redraw; source figures are not copied.
license.zh: 本地原创 SVG 重绘；未复制来源图形。

review.imagePolicy: Do not use new remote images in production until source and license are verified.
nextSteps: Open sources.json and pages/ to verify primary facts.
Record accepted/rejected image candidates in notes.md.
Move approved assets into resources/images only after review.
